content: We can frame Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework as a foundational base that can be augmented by multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to solve the flaw of converging to a locally optimal output that aligns with the LLM's own implicit biases. This creates a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no additional training or supervised data, while breaking through the limits of single-perspective self-feedback.
